title: Question about the Moon in 30
wikitext:
[]: Question about the Moon in 3.0             Quote Post by cyharding » Mon Feb 24, 2020 11:26 pm I have been wondering recently about the moon in 3.0. We know, besides beign very close to the Earth's surface, that it is rotating at a high rate of speed and has it's own atmosphere. My question is whether or not it still revolves around the Earth. Could it even still be considered a celestial body with how it is so close?

[]: Re: Question about the Moon in 3.0             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Tue Feb 25, 2020 12:30 pm It does. Watch very closely as that shot of the Moon pans down and you can see that it's moving across the horizon very very quickly.
